allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — Metro is live on http://localhost:8081" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081" -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — Metro is live" } catch { "Still bundling or error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
